description_long: This object is a treasure chest constructed with a sturdy gray metallic frame and wooden panels, featuring a hinged lid that is partially open. The chest is filled with large, faceted green gemstones, some of which spill out onto the ground around it. The metal frame is reinforced with rivets and includes a prominent lock at the front, suggesting security and value. The gemstones are cut in a geometric style, with flat faces and sharp edges, giving them a striking, crystalline appearance. The chest's design is reminiscent of classic pirate or adventure motifs, with a utilitarian yet decorative aesthetic. The overall look is both functional and ornamental, blending robust construction with the allure of precious contents.
description: A metal and wood treasure chest filled with large, faceted green gemstones, some spilling out. The chest features a prominent lock and a partially open lid, evoking a classic adventure motif.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chest's open lid and several green gemstones spilling out from the right side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the lock, the open lid, and a clear view of the gemstones inside and in front of the chest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the lid open and gemstones spilling out from the left side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the closed back panel of the chest and gemstones barely visible on either side.
